items.title: Why Johnson & Johnson Stock Still Has Room To Run
items.description: Johnson & Johnson's stock still has room to rise after the recent financial results exceeded expectations. Learn how J&J is positioned for success.

items.title: Jessica Dean Named Finalist for Texas Legal Awards’ 2025 Influential Woman of the Year
items.description: DALLAS, August 04, 2025--National plaintiff firm Dean Omar Branham Shirley, LLP, is pleased to announce that name partner Jessica Dean has been named a Texas Legal Awards finalist for Influential Woman of the Year by Texas Lawyer and Law.com. The winner will be announced in late September.

items.title: Will These 5 Pharma, Biotech Bigwigs Surpass Q2 Earnings Forecasts?
items.description: Let's look at five pharma and biotech companies, PFE, LLY, AMGN, GILD and NVO, which are scheduled to release their second-quarter 2025 results this week.

items.title: J&J Expects Better Top-Line Growth in 2H: Can It Achieve the Goal?
items.description: JNJ lifts 2025 sales and EPS outlook on strong Q2 results, with new drug launches and MedTech gains fueling momentum.
